purpose: Real LLM agent tool-call/action trace datasets for behavioral drift detection research

datasets.name: ToolBench (G1/G2/G3 sample)
datasets.paper: ToolLLM: Facilitating LLMs to Master 16000+ Real-world APIs (2023)
datasets.agent: ChatGPT (gpt-3.5-turbo) with DFS decision tree search
datasets.format: JSON per session, fields: win, tree, forward_args, compare_candidates, answer_generation
datasets.action_field: answer_generation.query_count (total API calls), answer_generation.chain (full message chain)
datasets.task_type: REST API tool use (16K+ real-world APIs across categories: weather, finance, travel, etc.)
datasets.notes: G1=single-tool, G2=multi-tool same category, G3=multi-tool cross-category. Full dataset: 126,486 instances on Google Drive (auth required). This is the data_example subset.

key_schema.answer_generation.query_count: int - number of API calls made
key_schema.answer_generation.chain: list of {role, content} - full conversation with tool calls

datasets.name: AgentBench Knowledge Graph
datasets.format: JSON array, fields: question, qid, source, entities, s_expression, actions, answer
datasets.action_field: actions (list of SPARQL-like graph traversal operations)
datasets.task_type: Knowledge graph question answering (Freebase SPARQL traversal)

dbbench_standard.jsonl.note: DB task specs (not trajectories - SQL text2query tasks)

key_schema.actions: list of strings like get_relations(entity_id), get_neighbors(entity_id, relation), count(#ref)
key_schema.question: natural language question

datasets.name: SWE-agent Demonstrations
datasets.paper: SWE-agent: Agent-Computer Interfaces Enable Automated Software Engineering (2024)
datasets.format: .traj (JSON) with 'history' array of {role, content, action, thought, tool_calls}
datasets.task_type: Software engineering (bug fixes) + CTF security challenges

key_schema.history: list of messages, each with role (system/user/assistant/tool), content, action string, thought string

datasets.name: ReAct FEVER
datasets.paper: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models (2022)
datasets.format: Jupyter notebook with inline execution output - interleaved Thought/Action/Observation

datasets.name: ReAct WebShop
datasets.paper: ReAct: Synergizing Reasoning and Acting in Language Models (2022)
datasets.format: Jupyter notebook with inline execution output
datasets.task_type: E-commerce shopping task (WebShop environment - find products matching description)
datasets.parse_hint: Regex '^Action: (\w+)' (multiline) on notebook output cells (cell index 7)

what_was_NOT_found.WebArena trajectories: Only task specs (config_files/test.raw.json), no actual execution logs in repo
what_was_NOT_found.AgentBench OS interaction: Only task definitions (dev.json, training.json), not agent execution traces
what_was_NOT_found.ToolBench full dataset: 126K sessions available but on Google Drive (auth required). Only data_example (15 sessions) is on GitHub
what_was_NOT_found.SWE-bench evaluation runs: No pre-recorded trajectories committed - generated at eval time
what_was_NOT_found.HuggingFace datasets: auth required for direct API access

scale_notes.current_total: 2383 sessions / 15181 actions - exceeds 2000 action observation target
scale_notes.to_get_more: ToolBench full dataset (469K API calls) requires Google Drive download: https://drive.google.com/drive/folders/1TysbSWYpP8EioFu9xPJtpbJZMLLmwAmL
best_for_drift_detection: ToolBench G1/G2/G3: clear tool-call sequences, structured DFS trees, success/fail labels
SWE-agent .traj: richest per-step data (thought + action + observation + tool_calls dict)
ReAct WebShop: 500 complete shopping episodes, 4 action types, high volume
AgentBench KG: 1214 sessions with named graph traversal ops
